Name: FMovieSceneEvaluationGroupLUTIndex
Description: Lookup table index for a group of evaluation templates

Variables.Name: LUTOffset
Variables.Description: The offset within FMovieSceneEvaluationGroup::SegmentPtrLUT that this index starts

Variables.Name: NumInitPtrs
Variables.Description: The number of initialization pointers are stored after &FMovieSceneEvaluationGroup::SegmentPtrLUT[0] + LUTOffset.

Variables.Name: NumEvalPtrs
Variables.Description: The number of evaluation pointers are stored after &FMovieSceneEvaluationGroup::SegmentPtrLUT[0] + LUTOffset + NumInitPtrs.
